title: Update upgrade manifest and bundled catalog logic for split skill assets
description: Revise upgrade-manifest prefixes and bundled asset catalog generation so upgrade evaluation tracks `templates/skills/` as the subagent template source while continuing to manage repo-root operator exceptions correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Upgrade catalog generation includes bundled subagent Codex skill templates from `templates/skills/` and no longer assumes the full catalog lives in `.agents/skills/`.
Manifest prefix handling distinguishes `templates/skills/` from repo-root `.agents/skills/` exception assets.
Upgrade decisions for new, modified, restored, disabled, and user-added assets continue to work for the new split roots.
